features: NEWEST AMAZING SHAPE DESIGN: Recoppa Apple Watch Cases with three-dimensional right-angle edge design which make your iwatch more gorgeous, more technological, light up your stylish look.

Recoppa Apple watch coveres are made of durable hard PC full cover the iwatch edges, which protects your Apple watch avoid from bumps, oil stains, scratches, and accidental drops, even can avoid the water getting trapped between the case and screen.
KEEP ORIGINAL FUNCTION : Recoppa iwatch cases with screen protector remain all controls, buttons, sensors and apple watch original features.And you don't need to remove it when the watch is charged.
COMPATIBLE: Recoppa protective Cases are perfect for Apple Watch Series 8/7 45mm.(Smart Watch is NOT INCLUDED)

WHAT YOU GET: PACKAGE : 2 x iWatch Cases 45mm, 2 x clean kits AND PERFECT AFTER-SALE SERVICE: If any quality problem arises within one year, please contact us at any time, we will give you satisfactory reply within 24H.
